appliedRows.title: Mustafa Suleyman
appliedRows.text: Evidence quote: I'm the CEO of Microsoft AI, a division bringing together our major consumer AI products including Copilot, Bing, GroupMe, MSN and Edge. Our mission is to build state of the art AI models, and create an AI companion for everyone. Selection reason: 本人官方主页，明确列出其职位、作品及观点，是权威且可访问的直接来源。 Source preview: Mustafa Suleyman Mustafa Suleyman I'm the CEO of Microsoft AI, a division bringing together our major consumer AI products including Copilot, Bing, GroupMe, MSN and Edge. Our mission is to build state of the art AI models, and create an AI companion for everyone. Writing My latest blog posts and opinion articles. What is an AI anyway? TED Even those closest to the development of AI are struggling to describe exactly where things are headed. In my TED talk I set out a new vision for the future of artificial intelligence. I outline what is coming, warn of humanity’s greatest challenge and explain how this can be a moment of hope and inspiration for us all. Watch on youtube The Coming Wave We ... appliedRows.title: Shane Legg - Nominating Committee - The AI Safety Foundation
appliedRows.text: Evidence quote: Shane Legg is co-founder and Chief AGI Scientist at Google DeepMind, where he leads the Technical AGI Safety team. He holds a PhD from the Dalle Molle Institute for Artificial Intelligence Research (IDSIA)... Selection reason: AI安全基金会官方页面，详细介绍了Shane Legg的职位、学术背景和成就，是权威的机构资料页。 Source preview: Shane Legg Hinton Lectures™ Nominating Committee Member Shane Legg is co-founder and Chief AGI Scientist at Google DeepMind, where he leads the Technical AGI Safety team. He holds a PhD from the Dalle Molle Institute for Artificial Intelligence Research (IDSIA), where he proposed a formal definition of machine intelligence. A recognized leader in artificial general intelligence, Shane has held research roles at the Swiss Finance Institute and UCL’s Gatsby Unit. He was appointed Commander of the Order of the British Empire (CBE) in 2019 and was named to TIME’s list of the 100 most influential people in AI in 2023. about AISF The AI Safety Foundation increases awareness and scientific underst... appliedRows.title: V-JEPA: The next step toward advanced machine intelligence
appliedRows.text: Evidence quote: V-JEPA: The next step toward Yann LeCun’s vision of advanced machine intelligence (AMI) Selection reason: Meta官方博客文章，明确将V-JEPA模型与Yann LeCun的愿景关联，是权威的一手来源。 Source preview: Meta Products AI Research Resources About Get Llama Try Meta AI V-JEPA: The next step toward Yann LeCun’s vision of advanced machine intelligence (AMI) February 15, 2024• 3 minute read Takeaways: Today, we’re publicly releasing the Video Joint Embedding Predictive Architecture (V-JEPA) model, a crucial step in advancing machine intelligence with a more grounded understanding of the world. This early example of a physical world model excels at detecting and understanding highly detailed interactions between objects. In the spirit of responsible open science, we’re releasing this model under a Creative Commons NonCommercial license for researchers to further explore. As humans, much of what w... appliedRows.title: Mark Zuckerberg, Founder, Chairman and Chief Executive Officer
appliedRows.text: Evidence quote: Mark Zuckerberg is the founder, chairman and CEO of Meta, which he originally founded as Facebook in 2004. He is responsible for setting the overall direction and product strategy for the company. Selection reason: Meta官方领导层页面，明确列出扎克伯格的职位和职责，是权威的官方来源。 Source preview: Mark Zuckerberg Mark Zuckerberg Founder, Chairman and Chief Executive Officer Follow on: Facebook iconThreads iconInstagram icon Mark Zuckerberg is the founder, chairman and CEO of Meta, which he originally founded as Facebook in 2004. He is responsible for setting the overall direction and product strategy for the company. In October 2021, Facebook rebranded to Meta to reflect all of its products and services across its family of apps and a focus on developing social experiences for the metaverse – moving beyond 2D screens towards immersive experiences, such as augmented and virtual reality to help build the next evolution in social technology. Mark is also the co-founder and co-CEO of the...
